comment: Copied to PROJECT_ROOT/migration/mask-rules.json at intake. Applied by lib/normalize.mjs to BOTH sides before any diff. Every rule added during calibration/loop must include a reason and be logged.

mask_selectors.reason: consent banners are capture noise; capture auto-dismisses, this is the backstop

mask_attribute_patterns.reason: animation state classes vary by capture timing

freeze.comment: capture-time stabilization, applied identically on both sides
